parameters.query:
DELETE FROM document_embeddings WHERE document_id = {{ $json.query.document_id }};

SELECT
  d.id AS document_id,
  d.title,
  d.file_name,
  d.extracted_text,
  d.decision_date,
  db.code AS decision_body_code,
  db.name AS decision_body_name
FROM uploaded_documents d
LEFT JOIN decision_bodies db ON db.id = d.decision_body_id
WHERE d.id = {{ $json.query.document_id }}
  AND d.extracted_text IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO document_embeddings (document_id, chunk_index, content, metadata, embedding)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5::vector)
ON CONFLICT (document_id, chunk_index) DO UPDATE
SET
  content   = EXCLUDED.content,
  metadata  = EXCLUDED.metadata,
  embedding = EXCLUDED.embedding;
UPDATE uploaded_documents SET status = 'ready' WHERE id = {{ $('Loop Over Chunks').first().json.document_id }};
